name: RACK RATES- Salt Lick Safari Lodge and Taita Hills Safari Resort Spa-2025

origin.filename: RACK RATES- Salt Lick Safari Lodge and Taita Hills Safari Resort Spa-2025.pdf

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: THE RESORT & LODGE ACCOMMODATION RACK RATES (Validity 2nd January 2025- to 1st January 2026)
texts.text: THE RESORT & LODGE ACCOMMODATION RACK RATES (Validity 2nd January 2025- to 1st January 2026)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy
texts.text: Child Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child from infant to age 4yrs sharing with 1 or 2 adults -FOC at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa
texts.text: Child from infant to age 4yrs sharing with 1 or 2 adults -FOC at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. sharing with 1 or two adults -50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. sharing with 1 or two adults -50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -Maximum three guests per room
texts.text: -Maximum three guests per room

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. in own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) -75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.
texts.text: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs. in own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) -75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -If children are younger than 12 yrs., they should share connecting rooms (subject to availability)
texts.text: -If children are younger than 12 yrs., they should share connecting rooms (subject to availability)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For safety reasons, children under the age of 5 years are not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge
texts.text: For safety reasons, children under the age of 5 years are not permitted at Salt Lick Safari Lodge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Please see occupancy rules below;
texts.text: Please see occupancy rules below;

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Occupancy Rules;
texts.text: Occupancy Rules;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Salt Lick Safari Lodge -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)
texts.text: Salt Lick Safari Lodge -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Subject to availability of triple rooms.
texts.text: Subject to availability of triple rooms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Interconnecting rooms are NOT available at Salt Lick Safari Lodge
texts.text: Interconnecting rooms are NOT available at Salt Lick Safari Lodge

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)
texts.text: Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa -Maximum 3 adults or 2 adults and 1 child (adults and children)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Subject to availability of triple rooms
texts.text: Subject to availability of triple rooms

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Interconnecting rooms are available at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa.
texts.text: Interconnecting rooms are available at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Suites- Maximum 2 adults and 1 child
texts.text: The Suites- Maximum 2 adults and 1 child

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Policy
texts.text: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sanctuary entry fees apply at US$ 40 per Adult/ child US$ 20 per night: 2 nd  January 2025- 1st January 2026/ children below 5yrs FOC.
texts.text: Sanctuary entry fees apply at US$ 40 per Adult/ child US$ 20 per night: 2 nd  January 2025- 1st January 2026/ children below 5yrs FOC.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sanctuary entry fees do not apply for stays at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa unless guests enter the sanctuary for game activities.
texts.text: Sanctuary entry fees do not apply for stays at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa unless guests enter the sanctuary for game activities.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Vehicle Entry Fees;
texts.text: Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary Vehicle Entry Fees;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please note every vehicle accessing Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary will be subject to Vehicle Entry Fees payable per vehicle, per night.
texts.text: Please note every vehicle accessing Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary will be subject to Vehicle Entry Fees payable per vehicle, per night.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Day Room & Check-In/ Checkout Policy
texts.text: Day Room & Check-In/ Checkout Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check-in time 1200hrs
texts.text: Check-in time 1200hrs

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Checkout time 1000hrs
texts.text: Checkout time 1000hrs

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day rooms can be booked for 50% of the double/single room rate for use until 17h00 inclusive of lunch.
texts.text: Day rooms can be booked for 50% of the double/single room rate for use until 17h00 inclusive of lunch.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day rooms are subject to the same occupancy rules as overnight rules.
texts.text: Day rooms are subject to the same occupancy rules as overnight rules.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Departure from the room after 17h00hrs is charged at the overnight rate.
texts.text: Departure from the room after 17h00hrs is charged at the overnight rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Walk-in Meals / Additional Meals (as per COVID-19 guidelines and protocols)
texts.text: Walk-in Meals / Additional Meals (as per COVID-19 guidelines and protocols)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Hot Buffet breakfast at US$ 25 per person
texts.text: Hot Buffet breakfast at US$ 25 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Hot Buffet lunch at US$ 25 per person
texts.text: Hot Buffet lunch at US$ 25 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Buffet dinner at US$ 30 per person
texts.text: Buffet dinner at US$ 30 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Additional picnic box meal (breakfast, lunch, or dinner) US$ 25 per person
texts.text: Additional picnic box meal (breakfast, lunch, or dinner) US$ 25 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children pay 50% of the above meals rate.
texts.text: Children pay 50% of the above meals rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Half Board Reduction
texts.text: Half Board Reduction

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · HB reduction US$ 5 per adult /child per night
texts.text: HB reduction US$ 5 per adult /child per night

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS & CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS & CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. All terms and conditions apply.
texts.text: All terms and conditions apply.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Above rates include Statutory Government Taxes (VAT, Service Charge & Catering Levy)
texts.text: Above rates include Statutory Government Taxes (VAT, Service Charge & Catering Levy)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Booking Terms:
texts.text: Booking Terms:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -All booking vouchers must be sent to reservations office for confirmation of availability and subsequent reservations of the same upon availability.
texts.text: -All booking vouchers must be sent to reservations office for confirmation of availability and subsequent reservations of the same upon availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -Accommodation request/booking vouchers to specify and must clearly show the unit being booked by email to:
texts.text: -Accommodation request/booking vouchers to specify and must clearly show the unit being booked by email to:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -for Salt Lick Safari Lodge; reservations@saltlicksafarilodge.com
texts.text: -for Salt Lick Safari Lodge; reservations@saltlicksafarilodge.com

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -for Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa; reservations@taitahillssafariresort.com
texts.text: -for Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa; reservations@taitahillssafariresort.com

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Payments Terms:
texts.text: Payments Terms:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cash Payments: All bookings must be accompanied by a travel agency voucher and paid before the arrival date. Cheques will not be accepted.
texts.text: Cash Payments: All bookings must be accompanied by a travel agency voucher and paid before the arrival date. Cheques will not be accepted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -Payments by Master card, Visa card and AMEX are accepted
texts.text: -Payments by Master card, Visa card and AMEX are accepted

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Cancelation and No-Show
texts.text: Cancelation and No-Show

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: If the guest/Agent cancels the reservation the Resorts has the right to apply the following cancellation conditions:
texts.text: If the guest/Agent cancels the reservation the Resorts has the right to apply the following cancellation conditions:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -30- 16 days before arrival date - 20% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked
texts.text: -30- 16 days before arrival date - 20% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -15- 8 days before arrival date - 40% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked
texts.text: -15- 8 days before arrival date - 40% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -7- 3 days before arrival date - 75% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked
texts.text: -7- 3 days before arrival date - 75% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -2 days- to date of arrival - 100% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.
texts.text: -2 days- to date of arrival - 100% loss of the total amount of the accommodation booked.

texts.text: For Reservations, please contact.
